title: EffectMC
description: Trigger special effects live in-game! Multiple mod loaders supported!
body:
EffectMC is a **Minecraft Forge**/**NeoForge** and **Fabric** mod that adds various vanilla-themed special effects to Minecraft!

Available effects include:
- Joining a server silently with the push of a button!
- Updating your current skin
- Sending/Receiving chat messages
- Running chat commands
- [And more!](https://github.com/MoSadie/EffectMC/wiki/effect-compendium)

This mod is designed to be the building blocks for your content, with a large focus on customizability and being flexable. To that end, there are three easy ways to trigger effects:
- [An Elgato Stream Deck plugin](https://github.com/MoSadie/EffectMC/wiki/Step-2)
- A built-in web dashboard hosted locally by the mod.
- [Custom HTTP requests](https://github.com/MoSadie/EffectMC/wiki/send-http-request)
